en.title: web design consultant
en.prompt: I want you to act as a web design consultant. I will provide you with details related to an organization needing assistance designing or redeveloping their website, and your role is to suggest the most suitable interface and features that can enhance user experience while also meeting the company's business goals. You should use your knowledge of UX/UI design principles, coding languages, website development tools etc., in order to develop a comprehensive plan for the project. My first request is [website needs and organization info]
en.remark: From the perspective of web development and design, provide interface and functionality suggestions aimed at improving user experience.

related.title: Stackoverflow Answer
related.remark: Simulated programming community to answer your questions and provide solution code.

related.title: Code Anything Now
related.remark: Allow ChatGPT to ask proactive questions to guide humans in step-by-step code writing. Collected from Snackprompt, shared by @fuxinsen.

related.title: Code Interpreter
related.remark: Let AI explain the function of each line of code. Contributed by @Tractor1928 and @yiqiongwu.

metaDescription: Redeveloping a site? Get a comprehensive plan covering features, interface, and business goals. Enhance UX with expert web design consultation.

faq.q: How is this different from ID 92 UX/UI?
faq.a: ID 92 leans toward pure experience design (user mental model, interaction flow). ID 93 leans toward "websites" (responsive, SEO, conversion funnels). Pick 92 for mobile apps or internal tools, pick 93 for marketing landing pages, e-commerce, or corporate sites. You can chain them: use 92 to set the experience, then 93 to fill in site-specific details.

faq.q: Can it write SEO-friendly page structure for me?
faq.a: Yes, append "provide HTML semantic structure recommendations that follow SEO best practices: h1/h2 hierarchy, meta description, schema structured data types." The AI has the general SEO framework, but specific keyword placement still needs real search data to decide.
